skill_statuses.description: Execute a scoped CCM project assignment, implement and verify changes, and return a structured delivery receipt.

skill_statuses.name: ccm-project-source-research
skill_statuses.description: Inspect current project source, repository state, instructions, and established patterns before implementation.

skill_statuses.description: Produce a structured CCM implementation receipt containing actions, changed files, verification, blockers, and Skill usage.

skill_statuses.description: Map CCM acceptance criteria to reproducible command, API, browser, screenshot, and artifact evidence.
